The '''''Invincible''-class Dreadnaught Heavy Cruiser''', sometimes referred to as the '''''Invincible''-class Heavy Cruiser''' or '''''Invincible''-class Dreadnaught''', was a type of [[Warship/Legends|warship]] that served for many centuries in naval forces around [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="HSCS" />

==Characteristics==
The ''Invincible''-class was a cylindrical-shaped, 2,011 meter long warship. The variant in use with the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] fleet was armed with six [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] tubes, twelve [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] cannons, thirty [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannons]] and six [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors.<ref name="HSCS" />

==History==
[[File:InvincibleDreadnaughtschematics.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Angela Krin]] in front of an ''Invincible''-class schematic.]]

Designed after the massive [[Battlecruiser/Legends|battlecruisers]] that served in the navies of [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]] and the colossal battle cruisers of the [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]], the ''Invincible''-class dreadnaught was constructed by [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]] and [[Vaufthau Shipyards Ltd.|Vaufthau Shipyards, Ltd.]],<ref name="HSCS" /> c. [[3017 BBY]],<ref name="EA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> during the [[Seventeenth Alsakan Conflict]] between [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and Alsakan. They were among the largest Republic capital ships of the era.<ref name="HSCS" />

Soon after their development, changes in weapons technology rendered large capital ships like the ''Invincible''-class extremely vulnerable to small, fast attack ships. For many centuries the balance of military power would rest with smaller warships only a few hundred meters in length. Nevertheless, this class saw some use with the forces of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and a number of them were later acquired from Imperial surplus by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] and fielded as picket ships. Advisors hired from system defense navies that still used this and other outdated ships were used to train crews to operate the ''Invincible''-class as well as do minor systems upgrades to the vessels.<ref name="HSCS" />

Despite their large size and crew complement, they were generally limited to combating pirates and smugglers, but they were cheap to acquire and simple to operate, and they combined an atmospheric maneuvering capability with the ability to deploy a relatively large force of ground troops.<ref name="HSCS" />

During the [[Reconquest of the Rim]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wullf Yularen/Legends|Wullf Yularen]] used these dreadnoughts in his [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]].<ref name="TEGW" />
